prompt_text: What tools do B2B SaaS startups companies use to manage ai visibility tracking workflows?
response:
# AI Visibility & Workflow Tracking Tools for B2B SaaS

## Core Workflow Management
- **Zapier/Make** - Connect AI tools with CRM, email, analytics
- **n8n** - Open-source workflow automation with AI integrations
- **Retool** - Build internal tools to monitor AI pipeline workflows
- **Windmill** - Developer-friendly workflow automation

## AI-Specific Monitoring
- **Langsmith** (LangChain) - Debug and monitor LLM applications
- **Arize** - ML model monitoring and observability
- **Weights & Biases** - Experiment tracking and model governance
- **Arthur** - AI model monitoring and explainability
- **Fiddler** - Model performance and drift detection

## Analytics & Visibility Dashboards
- **Mixpanel/Amplitude** - Track AI feature usage and user behavior
- **Segment** - Centralize data from AI workflows
- **PostHog** - Open-source product analytics with AI insights
- **Metabase/Looker** - Custom dashboards for workflow metrics

## Operational Monitoring
- **DataDog/New Relic** - Infrastructure and API performance
- **Sentry** - Error tracking in AI pipelines
- **Supabase/Firebase** - Backend observability for AI services

## Document & Process Tracking
- **Notion/Linear** - Workflow documentation and task management
- **GitHub Actions** - CI/CD visibility for model deployments

**What specific workflow aspect matters most to you?** (Model performance, user adoption, cost tracking, data quality?)
